/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/kvRaft_tests.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvRaft_tests.dir/src/kvraft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvRaft_tests.dir/src/kvserver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvRaft_tests.dir/tests/KV_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvRaft_tests.dir/6.5840/Lab3_Raft/src/raft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvRaft_tests.dir/6.5840/Lab3_Raft/src/persister.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvRaft_tests.dir/6.5840/Lab3_Raft/src/helper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvRaft_tests.dir/6.5840/Lab3_Raft/src/rpc/labrpc.cpp.o -o kvRaft_tests  /usr/local/lib/libgtest.a /usr/local/lib/libgtest_main.a -lpthread /usr/local/lib/libgtest.a
